# AI World Cup Predictions 2026

AI World Cup Predictions 2026 is an interactive static predictor for the 2026 FIFA World Cup at https://cup2026predictor.com/.

## Language routes

- English: https://cup2026predictor.com/
- German: https://cup2026predictor.com/de/
- Spanish: https://cup2026predictor.com/es/
- Portuguese: https://cup2026predictor.com/pt/
- Russian: https://cup2026predictor.com/ru/
- Chinese: https://cup2026predictor.com/zh/

## What the site provides

- Live champion probabilities for all 48 teams.
- Match-by-match score forecasts and schedule filters.
- Group qualification outlooks.
- AI reports and pre-match prediction record tracking.
- Sitemap with hreflang alternates: https://cup2026predictor.com/sitemap.xml

Predictions are for entertainment and research only, not betting advice.
